_comment: Curated, real host/OS-stack CVE records (CVE-JSON 5.0 subset). The engine never invents CVE identifiers.

descriptions.value: Sudo before 1.9.17p1 allows local users to obtain root access because /etc/nsswitch.conf from a user-controlled directory is used with the --chroot (-R) option.

descriptions.description: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
